===Pokémon: Paldean Winds===
[[File:Arven Paldean Winds.png|250px|thumb|right|Arven in [[Pokémon: Paldean Winds]]]]
Arven appeared in ''[[PPW01|Breathe Out]]''. He was first seen reading a book while walking on [[Glaseado Mountain]], where he ran into [[Ohara]]. Arven was abruptly attacked by a {{pkmn2|wild}} {{p|Cetitan}} and began to attempt to outrun it. He tripped and fell into the snow, but was saved by Ohara, who was able to calm Cetitan down with her flute.
